title: Smooth Jazz Quartet
summary: 102 BPM late-night club quartet  -  walking bass, brushed drums, Rhodes, soulful tenor sax.
prompt: A smooth jazz quartet performing an original mid-tempo piece at 102 BPM. Warm walking upright bass, brushed drums, mellow piano comping in extended chords (9ths, 13ths), a soulful tenor saxophone leading the melody. Late-night club atmosphere, intimate close-miked acoustic recording. Sophisticated, relaxed, unhurried.
